name: FirstCash Holdings, Inc.
summary: FirstCash Holdings, Inc. is the leading operator of pawn stores in the U.S., Latin America, and the U.K., operating over 3,300 pawnshops as of December 31, 2025. The Company provides non-recourse pawn loans collateralized by personal property such as jewelry, electronics, tools, and appliances, and sells pre-owned merchandise. It also operates AFF, a retail point-of-sale payment solutions business offering lease-to-own and retail financing products across a network of merchant partners.
